messages.author: carol_kim
messages.text: On it. POST /inventory/bulk-import timing out after 30 seconds for catalogs >5000 SKUs. Checking recent changes.

messages.author: kate_brennan
messages.text: There was a deploy 20 minutes ago. Checking diff.

messages.author: carol_kim
messages.text: Root cause: Bulk import wrapped in single DB transaction. 5000 individual INSERTs in one tra.... Rolling back.

messages.author: carol_kim
messages.text: Incident closed. Postmortem scheduled for tomorrow.
